title: Mapping PodSecurityPolicies to Pod Security Standards — PodSecurityPolicy Spec
text:
The fields enumerated in this table are part of the
PodSecurityPolicySpec
, which is specified
under the
.spec
field path.
Mapping PodSecurityPolicySpec fields to Pod Security Standards
